patch.value: todo.txt (A)=highest, pm 0=highest. Map (A)->0,(B)->1,(C)->2,(D)->3,(E)->4; F-Z->4. pm N->letter chr(65+N), clamp to A-E range for export (N>4 unusual).

author: codex

patch.value: Decision recorded: (A)->0,(B)->1,(C)->2,(D)->3,(E)->4; F-Z clamp to 4 (lowest). Export pm N->chr(65+N) clamped to A-E. Implemented in priorityLetterToPm/pmPriorityToLetter with unit tests; functionally verified (A->prio0, C->prio2 on real import).
